meanings.definition: the smallest whole number or a numeral representing this number
examples: he has the one but will need a two and three to go with it
this is the one I ordered

meanings.definition: used of a single unit or thing; not two or more
having the indivisible character of a unit
of the same kind or quality
being a single entity made by combining separate components
examples: three chemicals combining into one solution
she's one girl in a million
the one and only Muhammad Ali
infamy unmatched in the Western world
